subject: Resolve legacy protein endpoint conflation
description: Audit protein-named GCS edge files that currently use gene endpoints, update CLAUDE.md/schema notes, and decide the safe path before interaction/MoA/protein node exports.
result: Audited all protein-named GCS edge files. They physically use gene endpoints: protein_interacts_protein gene→gene, and molecule_targets_protein/disease_associated_protein/pathway_contains_protein/tissue_expresses_protein/phenotype_associated_protein y_type=gene. Updated CLAUDE.md to mark them as legacy gene/protein-conflated relations and to block blind interaction/MoA ingestion until protein node/remapping is handled.
